summary: Read-only R6 provenance/source-truth review completed. Inspected Codex MEMORY.md, OS remaining-gaps plan, completion conditions, OS v2 contract, verification docs, source/chunk/provenance code paths, hybrid retrieval provenance scoring, and data-vault RAG/source project docs. Verdict: plan has concrete completion conditions separating internal behavior memory from verified durable source support; no blocking document revision required for this reviewer lens.
decisions: The plan explicitly adds P0-06 source/chunk/claim lineage requirements, labels Context Pack item categories, rejects anchor_only_unverified as factual support, and requires graph/health failures for dangling claim_paths, missing provenance, missing verification status, or factual claims backed only by internal traces.

Existing code/data show provenance scaffolding and some verified_summary artifacts, but current retrieval/source tooling is not yet the gate itself; the reviewed plan correctly frames that as remaining implementation work rather than completed source-truth proof.
next_steps: Implement verify:source-lineage/status artifact and wire it into status:health, verify:goal, graph health, Context Pack labels, and RAG source-coverage reporting as specified by P0-06.
search_queries: rg create_source_chunk|claim_paths|anchor_only_unverified|provenance|source_chunk over src docs data project/source/wiki paths
